mapper.select:
SELECT user_id as userId, isbn, 'REVIEW' as activityType, 2.0 as weight, created_at as createdAt FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND temporary = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT user_id as userId, isbn, 'SCRAP' as activityType, 1.0 as weight, created_at as createdAt FROM book WHERE user_id = #{userId}
ORDER BY createdAt DESC

SELECT DISTINCT isbn FROM ( SELECT isbn FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND temporary = 0
UNION
SELECT isbn FROM book WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) AS user_books

SELECT user_id as userId, isbn, 'REVIEW' as activityType, 2.0 as weight, created_at as createdAt FROM reviews WHERE isbn = #{isbn} AND temporary = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT user_id as userId, isbn, 'SCRAP' as activityType, 1.0 as weight, created_at as createdAt FROM book WHERE isbn = #{isbn}
ORDER BY createdAt DESC

SELECT user_id as userId, isbn, 'REVIEW' as activityType, 2.0 as weight, created_at as createdAt FROM reviews WHERE temporary = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT user_id as userId, isbn, 'SCRAP' as activityType, 1.0 as weight, created_at as createdAt FROM book
ORDER BY createdAt DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM reviews WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND isbn = #{isbn} AND temporary = 0
UNION
SELECT 1 FROM book WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND isbn = #{isbn} ) AS book_check
SELECT isbn FROM ( SELECT isbn FROM reviews WHERE temporary = 0 UNION ALL SELECT isbn FROM book ) AS all_books GROUP BY isbn ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
